title: MikroTik FTC21-ups, Media converter with backup battery
description: The MikroTik FTC21-ups is an optical-metallic converter equipped with a switch chip, a backup battery for short-term power outages , SwOS Lite management (supporting VLAN, LAG, IGMP, SNMP, ACL, traffic shaping, etc.), in an outdoor enclosure with IP67 protection This converter features (2) 1Gbit ports (1x PoE-In, 1x PoE-Out) and (1) 2.5G SFP slot. The passive PoE-Out port can be switched between 24V and 48V. The converter supports multiple power supply methods, including active PoE standards (802.3af/at), passive PoE (48-57V) and DC connector (24-57V) Device Power adapter 48V/0.95A Gigabit PoE injector Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1G/2.5Gbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 48 .. 57V DC Battery capacity [mAh] 2500 Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards Passive 24V, Passive 48V PoE Out ports 1 Max. power consumption [W] 28 Power via connector/terminal 24 .. 57V DC Integrated battery Yes Physical characteristics Protection class IP67 Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 113 Height [mm] 268 Depth [mm] 44 Software Operating system SwOS
